name: jirasnap
description: Instant Jira task capture from VS Code.

jirasnap.baseUrl.description: Your Jira base URL. Example: https://your-org.atlassian.net

jirasnap.email.description: Jira account email used for API authentication.

jirasnap.apiToken.description: Jira API token used for API authentication.

jirasnap.projectKey.description: Jira project key where tasks will be created.

jirasnap.defaultEpicKey.description: Optional default parent epic. Accepts issue key (for example TNT-1900) or a full Jira browse URL. If empty or invalid, JiraSnap still creates the task without a parent.

jirasnap.capturesJql.default: labels = jirasnap ORDER BY created DESC
jirasnap.capturesJql.description: JQL query used by JiraSnap: Open Captures.

jirasnap.showStatusBarOpenCaptures.description: Show a status bar button that opens JiraSnap captures.

jirasnap.customFieldsJson.description: Optional JSON object merged into Jira issue fields. Use this for company-specific required fields. Example: {"customfield_11302":{"value":"Yes"},"customfield_12345":"ABC"}

jirasnap.capitalizableFieldId.description: Legacy optional single custom field id for Capitalizable. Leave empty unless your Jira instance requires it.

jirasnap.capitalizableValue.description: Legacy optional value used with jirasnap.capitalizableFieldId.

scripts.package:vsix: npm run assets && npm run build && npx @vscode/vsce package
